failed_scenarios.test_name: Playwright execution failed before failures were parsed
failed_scenarios.error_summary: Playwright exited with code 1, and results.json was not found.
failed_scenarios.likely_reason: The Playwright command failed before writing the JSON report, so CI could not extract individual failed scenarios.
failed_scenarios.recommended_action: Inspect the GitHub Actions log and raw Playwright artifacts, then rerun after fixing the execution/reporting failure.
